segments.text: Smash at the getup, but anyone can parry that!
segments.original_text: スマッシュ 起きたいところ 皆もここも捌く

segments.text: Dash attack where they're trying to skip the ledge!
segments.original_text: ダッシュ攻撃 崖をスキップしたいところに

segments.text: It connects and lands from center!
segments.original_text: 刺さって着地は 中央から

segments.text: Up smash against that bold fair!
segments.original_text: 上スマッシュ 勇気ある空中前

segments.text: And that reaches for the KO!

full_text: Smash at the getup, but anyone can parry that! Dash attack where they're trying to skip the ledge! It connects and lands from center! Up smash against that bold fair! And that reaches for the KO!

corrections.rule: Move: 出し攻撃→ダッシュ攻撃(DA)
